findings.evidence: `code/TauCeti/Analysis/PDE/UniformEllipticity.lean:612` defines `UniformlyEllipticOn.add_bounded`; `code/TauCeti/Analysis/PDE/UniformEllipticEnergy.lean:165`, `:194`, `:207`, `:219`, and `:232` define the corresponding energy/coercivity lemmas. The new proofs at `BoundedPerturbation.lean:71`, `:84`, `:96`, `:107`, and `:117` are exactly these applications.
findings.fix: Remove these declarations and have callers use `(h.add_bounded hMu_nonneg hMu_lt hp).<existing-energy-lemma>` directly.
findings.issue: All five new lemmas are direct forwarders through existing APIs: lines 60, 76, 88, 101, and 111 duplicate `UniformlyEllipticOn.add_bounded` followed by the existing `min_coercivityConstant_mul_norm_sq_le_energyIntegrand_self`, `isCoercive_energyIntegrand`, `isCoercive_energyIntegrand_on`, `isCoercive_energyIntegrand_zero_drift`, and `isCoercive_energyIntegrand_zero_drift_on`.

summary: The PR adds only wrapper declarations for composing the existing bounded-coefficient stability lemma with existing energy coercivity lemmas, creating duplicate API rather than new reusable material.
